---
title: "Weekly Report — Week 2 (26.02.2025 – 05.03.2025)"
output: 
  github_document:
date: "2026-03-05"
---

## Summary
Bug fixing week. Core simulation logic was corrected so that all agents update
their delegation decision each round based on the power values from t-1.
Summary metrics and visualisation toolkit were also revised.

## Work Done

**Bug Fixes**

- Fixed power update logic: agents now correctly observe power from t-1 when
  making delegation decisions in round t, producing proper dynamic behaviour
  over the T rounds

**Summary Metrics Revisions**

- Replaced slow per-node chain length loop with vectorized `igraph::distances()`

## Key Result
After fixes: power concentration and delegation dynamics now behave as expected.

## Open Issues

- Running first Simulations
